narrative:
Oakwood City has 7,194 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
